overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk along the exterior of Los Santos International Airport. The camera moves from an open approach with the iconic Theme Building visible, into a covered terminal walkway passing various airline counters including United, American Airlines, and Virgin Atlantic, with moderate vehicle traffic and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport approach road with iconic Theme Building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the open sidewalk toward the terminal entrance, with the futuristic Theme Building visible on the left

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving past on the airport access road

entered.detail: futuristic white structure with distinctive arching roof resembling the LAX Theme Building
tall cylindrical airport control tower with dark windows
modern airport terminal with glass facade and multiple levels
large vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny airport approach with the iconic Theme Building visible on the left and the control tower ahead. The camera walks along an open concrete sidewalk parallel to a multi-lane road with moderate vehicle traffic. Palm trees line the approach, and the modern glass terminal building dominates the center view.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered terminal walkway entrance under overhang

events.description: transitions from open exposed sidewalk into the covered terminal walkway with overhead protection

agents.ego_description: walking under the terminal overhang, entering the covered departure level walkway

entered.detail: concrete overhang providing shade over the terminal walkway
black hanging sign with white text indicating Terminal 1 United Airlines
white concrete pillars supporting the terminal overhang

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered terminal walkway, transitioning from bright sunlight to mixed lighting under the concrete overhang. United Airlines signage for Terminal 1 hangs overhead, and the control tower shifts to the left as the perspective moves forward. The environment becomes more enclosed with support columns lining the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered terminal walkway with airline check-in counters

events.description: passing under American Airlines signage indicating Terminal 2

agents.ego_description: walking past airline counters and digital displays, navigating around standing pedestrians near the curb

notable_agents.action: man in purple shirt standing near the curb looking at traffic

entered.detail: black hanging sign with white text for Terminal 2 American Airlines
black hanging sign with white text for Air Canada
vertical digital screen displaying Bloomberg advertisement

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered terminal walkway past Terminal 2, with American Airlines and Air Canada signage visible overhead. The crowd density increases with pedestrians standing near the road and walking along the path. Digital advertising screens line the right wall, and the multi-story parking garage remains visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered terminal walkway approaching Virgin Atlantic counters

agents.ego_description: continuing along the terminal walkway, passing travelers with luggage and approaching the Virgin Atlantic section

notable_agents.action: two men conversing while walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: black hanging sign with white text for Terminal 3 Virgin Atlantic

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the covered terminal walkway under Terminal 3 signage for Virgin Atlantic. The environment remains consistent with concrete support columns, digital advertisements on the right wall, and the parking garage visible across the road. Pedestrians are scattered along the path, some walking and others standing near the curb.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk from a bright, open airport approach into the sheltered environment of a terminal walkway. It begins on a sunny concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, with the iconic Theme Building and control tower visible against a clear sky. As the camera moves forward, the scene transitions from bright sunlight to mixed lighting under a concrete overhang, passing United Airlines signage as the space becomes more enclosed by support columns. The perspective then shifts past Terminal 2, where the crowd density increases and digital advertising screens appear along the right wall while a multi-story parking garage looms to the left. Finally, the camera continues along the covered path under Virgin Atlantic signage for Terminal 3, maintaining a steady pace past scattered pedestrians and concrete pillars.
